messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: run_gherkin_mutation.sh absolutizes two of its three path arguments — the third dumps scratch into a git-tracked vendor directory
What it solves: WHAT IS WRONG. `specs/pipeline/scripts/run_gherkin_mutation.sh` takes three path arguments —
feature-file, work-dir, steps-module — and absolutizes exactly two of them:
How it works: The work directory is resolved against the caller, not the tool's directory
